issue_title: [BUG]tests are failing for firefox browser in docker container
issue_body:
### System info
- Playwright Version: [v1.40.1]
- Operating System: [ Ubuntu 20]
- Browser: [Firefox]
- Other info:
- Docker image: mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.40.0-jammy

### Source code

[We will only be able to work on the issues that we can reproduce.]
when we try to execute tests in parallel mode using github action workflow in docker container using the 1.40.0-jammy latest version the test are failing only in firefox browser where as passed in webkit and chrome browsers.

![image](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/assets/107019981/0754cd7e-2e6b-4a28-b19b-0fca5d59466f)

![image](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/assets/107019981/2d71646f-46fc-47a9-a887-146bd9ff21ea)

![image](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/assets/107019981/85b17c0c-2667-4bda-8a08-f0298b8a1369)

![image](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/assets/107019981/987261cf-7bb5-4e46-bdb5-a50b90d2bf6c)

![image](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/assets/107019981/61c5cc72-d590-4f15-984d-6c647648489e)

![image](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/assets/107019981/7b7ab976-d76d-40b2-80f8-afddc902870b)

![image](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/assets/107019981/6f134c84-f3b7-461d-9fde-adafd51d38c0)

**Steps**
npx playwright test

**Expected**

All executed tests should work in all browsers in parallel mode with out any issue.

**Actual**

tests are failing in firefox browser
pr_title: chore(firefox): rewrite error message for $HOME directory ownership mismatch
pr_body: Fixes https://github.com/microsoft/playwright/issues/28896 Looks like this:
